_comment: PROPOSED Phoenix targeted-pytest PostToolUse hooks. Do NOT drop this on top of the live ~/.claude/settings.json. See CLAUDE_settings_hooks_PROPOSED.md for the merge procedure. Designed 2026-05-24.

_design_notes.goal: Run a small, file-scoped pytest subset after every Edit/Write to Python files under phoenix_bot/. Fail the edit on red so Claude cannot proceed.
_design_notes.why_not_full_suite: 2,110+ tests at ~minutes-per-run is too slow per edit; the per-edit pressure must stay short or it gets disabled in practice.
_design_notes.exit_2_blocks_tool: Per Claude Code hook contract, exit code 2 from a PostToolUse hook surfaces stderr to the model and signals the edit produced a failing state — the next response is forced to address it.
